message.content: 📚 **Guides Directory** — your one-stop hub for every tutorial, setup guide, and resource on the server. Bookmark this message for quick access.

embeds.title: 📚 Guides Directory
embeds.description:
Everything you need, organized in one place. Jump straight to any guide below — or use the buttons at the bottom for our featured picks.
​

fields.name: ⭐ Featured & Newest
fields.value:
- 🏁 **[Forza Horizon 6 — FREE + DLC + Online](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1506914849391644703)** — Full repack install + online multiplayer setup.
- 🦇 **[LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight \[CRACKED\]](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1511316991561170974)** — Download, gold-set unlocks & performance fix.
- 🎲 **[Gamble with UNLIMITED Friends](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1512185857724121338)** — Mod that raises lobbies from 6 → 12 players.
- 🍎 **[iOS Sideload (iOS 17+)](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1206485025441325086)** — Install premium apps & tweaks, no jailbreak.
​

fields.name: 🎮 Gaming & Emulation
fields.value:

- [RPCS3 — Play PS3 Games](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1102946464893780029) — Emulate & play PS3 games online.
- [Skate 3 Online](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1409579838133637250) — Full RPCS3 online multiplayer setup.
- [Make Your Own MC Server](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1095876056231190609) — Host your own Minecraft server.
- [Concurrent Steamshare](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1095875714596745276) — Play a shared Steam library at the same time.

fields.name: 🛠️ Modding & Cheats
